mapper.sql: sfwi.id, sfwi.group_id, sfwi.employee_id, sfwi.income_period, sfwi.work_card, sfwi.employee_name, round(sfwi.allocate_performance_pay,2) as allocate_performance_pay, sfwi.operation_code, sfwi.error_msg, sfwi.data_status, sfwi.attribute1, sfwi.attribute2, sfwi.attribute3, sfwi.create_time, sfwi.create_by, sfwi.update_time, sfwi.update_by, round(sfwi.pre_tax_withheld,2) as pre_tax_withheld, round(sfwi.after_tax_withheld,2) as after_tax_withheld , round(sfwi.production_factor,2) as production_factor, round(sfwi.quality_factor,2) as quality_factor, round(sfwi.assessment_coefficient,2) as assessment_coefficient

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.income_period as ${tAlias}_income_period, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.employee_name as ${tAlias}_employee_name, ${tAlias}.allocate_performance_pay as ${tAlias}_allocate_performance_pay, ${tAlias}.operation_code as ${tAlias}_operation_code, ${tAlias}.error_msg as ${tAlias}_error_msg, ${tAlias}.data_status as ${tAlias}_data_status, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.pre_tax_withheld as ${tAlias}_pre_tax_withheld, ${tAlias}.after_tax_withheld as ${tAlias}_after_tax_withheld, ${tAlias}.production_factor as ${tAlias}_production_factor, ${tAlias}.quality_factor as ${tAlias}_quality_factor, ${tAlias}.assessment_coefficient as ${tAlias}_assessment_coefficient
mapper.insert: insert into swm_floating_wage_interface (group_id, employee_id, income_period, work_card, employee_name, allocate_performance_pay, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, pre_tax_withheld, after_tax_withheld, production_factor,quality_factor,assessment_coefficient ) values (#{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{incomePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{allocatePerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{preTaxWithheld,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{afterTaxWithheld,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{productionFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{qualityFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{assessmentCoefficient,jdbcType=DECIMAL} )

insert into swm_floating_wage_interface ( group_id, employee_id, income_period, work_card, employee_name, allocate_performance_pay, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, pre_tax_withheld, after_tax_withheld,production_factor,quality_factor,assessment_coefficient ) select #{groupId, jdbcType= BIGINT}, ISNULL(( SELECT se.employee_id FROM swm_employee se WHERE RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) AND se.work_flag = 1 ),- 1), #{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{allocatePerformancePay, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, 'C', CASE WHEN (SELECT ISNULL((SELECT se.employee_id FROM swm_employee se WHERE RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) and se.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND se.work_flag = 1),- 1)) = - 1 THEN '工号姓名匹配失败' ELSE case when not exists (select 1 from swm_floating_wage sfw where sfw.enabled_flag = 1 and sfw.income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and isnull(sfw.frozen_flag, 0) = 0) then '该所的期间已冻结或不存在' else '' END end, CASE WHEN (SELECT ISNULL((SELECT se.employee_id FROM swm_employee se WHERE RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) and se.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND se.work_flag = 1),- 1)) = - 1 THEN 'F' ELSE case when not exists (select 1 from swm_floating_wage sfw where sfw.enabled_flag = 1 and sfw.income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and isnull(sfw.frozen_flag, 0) = 0) then 'F' else 'T' END end, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{preTaxWithheld,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{afterTaxWithheld,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{productionFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{qualityFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{assessmentCoefficient,jdbcType=DECIMAL}
mapper.update: update swm_floating_wage_interface set group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, income_period = #{incomePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_name = #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, allocate_performance_pay = #{allocatePerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, operation_code = #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_status = #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, pre_tax_withheld = #{preTaxWithheld,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, after_tax_withheld = #{afterTaxWithheld,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, production_factor = #{productionFactor,jdbcType=BIGINT}, quality_factor = #{qualityFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, assessment_coefficient = #{assessmentCoefficient,jdbcType=DECIMAL} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
